text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... At last. At long last! My super<n>secret
recipe is complete!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Papa always said an athlete needs to<n>watch what
they eat... and I plan to do<n>just that!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
With this raw egg, chicken breast and<n>habanero
drink in my arsenal, I shall<n>soon be invincible,
unstoppable, and<n>SUPER SWOLE!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The trick is... to hold your nose while<n>you down it
in one gulp.
